Vice-Chainnan and Members) Rules, [986, namely :- I. ( I) These rules may be called O,e Himacbal Pradesh AdmiJtistrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service of Chaimlan, Vice-ChaiJman and Members) Amendment Rules, 1997 .. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. [n the Himachal Pradesb Administrative Tribunal (Salaries and Allowances and Conditions of Service ofChainnan , Vice-Chainnan and Members) Rules, 1986, in rule 8. for sub-rule (2), thc following sub-rule shall be substituted, name[y:- "(2) Pension under sub-rule (I) shall be calculated at the rate of rupees one thousand four hlmdred and fIfty per annum for each completed year of service : Provided that tho aggregate amount of pension payable under Utis rule together with the amount of any pension jncluding commuted portion of pension, if any, drawn or cntitled 10 be drawn while holding office in the Tribnnal sball not exceed tlle maximum anlOunt of pension prescribed for ajudge of O,e High Court. " [No. A 1l014/5197-AT] R. K. TANDON, JI. Secy. Footnote: The prinCipal rules were notified vide No. GSR [01 5(E), dated the 22nd August, 1986 and subsequently amended vide:- (i) GSR 424 (E), dated the 4th April, 1988. (ii) GSR [046 (E), daled the 1301 December, [989. (iii) GSR 729 (E), dated the 19th August, 1992. (iv) GSR 45 (E), dated the 31st January, 1994.
